caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is smiling and looking off-camera to the left, with a professional microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, there are framed pictures on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt. To the right, clothing racks filled with apparel are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red logo on the right that reads "REALLY FOR IT". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, maintaining his smile and gaze as he slightly shifts his head and expression.
